summary: Accepted the M2 map fixture source policy. The policy keeps M2 map fixtures synthetic, defines HISTORICAL/INFERRED/COMPOSITE/FICTIONAL label use, blocks real historical and cultural map claims without a separate research/content task, defines later provenance minimums, and confines bad-map fixtures to validation data.

tests_run.result: Showed task changes in project/tasks/active/M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001.json, untracked docs/research/, the historical handoff, route messages, and pre-existing unrelated coordination changes in project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, and project/tasks/thread-registry.json.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001
tests_run.result: OK task shape M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 REVIEW historical_researcher -> qa_reviewer
Confirmed no package, app, content-source, roadmap, ADR, PROJECT_STATUS.md, manifest, checksum, or validation-report changes are present in the current worktree.

Tracked diffs are project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/active/M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001.json, and project/tasks/thread-registry.json; the non-task coordination-state diffs are recorded as pre-existing unrelated changes.

tests_run.command: rg -n "HISTORICAL|INFERRED|COMPOSITE|FICTIONAL|Blocked|Minimum Provenance|Bad-Map|validation data only|formal historical map content|separate research/content task|source_category|confidence|coordinate_geometry_derivation_note|known_limitations" docs/research/m2-map-fixture-source-policy.md
tests_run.result: Confirmed the policy contains the four historicity labels, synthetic/formal distinction, blocked-claim rule, provenance fields, and bad-map validation-only section.

decisions: ACCEPT: M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 satisfies all task acceptance criteria and the review focus.
The policy is documentation-only and does not authorize formal historical map production or historical claim data.
risks: The worktree still contains unrelated coordination-state changes outside this task; they were not reviewed as this task's deliverables.
Later map/content tasks must still implement source and claim records before using real names, symbols, polity control, cultural identity, or historical settlement claims.
requested_action: Record QA acceptance and continue lead integration for M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001. Do not treat this policy as approval for production historical map content.
